description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and basic, and define a series of C++ jobs. In the build stage add arm64 (image arm64v8/debian:latest, tags non-shared and arm, allow_failure, interruptible, needs g++, runs apt-get update/install ca‑certificates g++ cmake make libblas-dev liblapack-dev libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libopenmpi-dev pkg-config libfftw3-dev tar wget; mkdir build && cd build; c++ --version; cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_COMPILE_WARNING_AS_ERROR=ON; cmake --build .; OMPI_ALLOW_RUN_AS_ROOT=1 OMPI_ALLOW_RUN_AS_ROOT_CONFIRM=1 ctest -j 2 --output-on-failure), circle (default image, tags non-shared and x86_64, installs clang cmake g++-11 gzip libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libelf1 libfftw3-dev make pkg-config tar wget; download and extract Circle build; ./build_latest/circle --version; mkdir build && cd build; CXX=`pwd`/../build_latest/circle cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DENABLE_CIRCLE=1; cmake --build . --parallel 4 || make VERBOSE=1; ctest -j 2 --output-on-failure), circle‑latest c++20 (similar to circle but uses latest Circle tarball and sets CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=20), clang++ (default image, tags non-shared, installs clang cmake make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libfftw3-dev liblapack-dev pkg-config; mkdir build && cd build; clang++ --version; CXX=clang++ cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG=1"; cmake --build . --parallel 2 || cmake --build . --parallel 1 --verbose; ctest --parallel 2 || ctest --verbose --rerun-failed --output-on-failure), clang++ ubsan (needs clang++, installs clang libclang-rt-dev cmake make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libfftw3-dev liblapack-dev pkg-config; export UBSAN_OPTIONS=print_stacktrack=1; mkdir build && cd build; clang++ --version; CXX=clang++ cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-g -fsanitize=undefined -fsanitize=signed-integer-overflow -fsanitize=unsigned-integer-overflow -fno-sanitize-recover=undefined -DUBSAN=1" -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS="-fsanitize=undefined"; cmake --build . --parallel 4 || cmake --build . --parallel 1 --verbose; ctest -j 2 --output-on-failure), clang++‑16 std‑20 (image ubuntu:24.04, tags non-shared and docker, needs clang++, installs clang‑16 cmake make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libc++-dev libc++abi-dev libfftw3-dev liblapack-dev pkg-config tar wget; mkdir build && cd build; clang-16 --version; clang++-16 --version; CXX=clang++-16 cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=20; cmake --build .; ctest -j 2 --output-on-failure), clang++‑18 mull‑18 (image ubuntu:24.04, allow_failure, tags x86_64 large-memory-space non-shared, needs clang++ and g++, installs gnupg curl wget ca‑certificates clang-18 cmake file libclang-rt-18-dev make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev; adds Mull repository, installs mull-18 libclang-cpp18; builds with CXX=clang++-18 and -fpass-plugin=/usr/lib/mull-ir-frontend-18, runs ctest and then runs mull‑runner‑18 on each test executable), clang++‑latest libc++ format (image debian:latest, tags non-shared docker, needs clang++, installs clang clang-format cmake make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libc++-dev libc++abi-dev libfftw3-dev liblapack-dev pkg-config tar wget; builds with libc++ flags, runs ctest, then runs clang-format --dry-run -Werror on source files), clang++‑latest tidy iwyu everything (image debian:latest, tags non-shared docker, needs clang++, installs clang clang-tidy cmake iwyu make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libfftw3-dev liblapack-dev pkg-config; builds with clang‑tidy and iwyu integration, runs ctest), clang++‑m32 (image debian:latest, tags non-shared high-bandwidth x86_64, needs clang++, adds i386 architecture, installs clang g++ g++-multilib git cmake make libboost-serialization-dev:i386 tar wget pkg-config; builds with -m32 flag, runs ctest), clang++‑oldstable‑cmake4 (image debian:oldstable, tags non-shared docker, needs clang++, installs clang-13 cmake make libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libfftw3-dev pkg-config wget; downloads and installs CMake 4.1.0‑rc2, builds with Release, runs ctest), coverage (allow_failure, only on master, artifacts with coverage.xml in Cobertura format, tags non-shared docker, needs g++, installs cmake curl g++ gcovr git make lcov libboost-timer-dev libboost-serialization-dev libblas-dev libfftw3-dev pkg-config wget; builds with --coverage flags, runs ctest Test and Coverage, generates coverage.xml with gcovr, uploads to Codecov), cuda (image nvcr.io/nvidia/cuda:12.0.1-devel-ubuntu22.04, tags non-shared nvidia-gpu, needs g++, installs cmake g++-12 wget pkg-config make libboost-serialization-dev libboost-timer-dev libblas-dev libfftw3-dev; builds with CMake enabling CUDA, runs ctest), and cuda‑11.5.2 (image nvcr.io/nvidia/cuda:11.5.2-devel-ubuntu20.04, tags non-shared nvidia-gpu, needs cuda, installs cmake, builds with CUDA, runs ctest).
